case_title: NATALIA LERMAN ET AL VS. TEMI ADAMOLEKUN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS EDWARD GORENSHTEYN AND NATALIA LERMAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT TEMI ADAMOLEKUN IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2, 133.28. DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT BY ELECTRONIC PAYMENT THROUGH VENMO. PLAINTIFF CONFIRMS RECEIPT OF PAYMENT. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LERMAN, NATALIA GORENSHTEYN, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMOLEKUN, TEMI DBA PEMBROKE PR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUL-27-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMOLEKUN, TEMI DBA PEMBROKE PR
